ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the governor of the province */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provincial government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the station is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the police station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the police station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the police station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime category */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the severity of the crime */,
  "legal_statute" TEXT /* Legal statute or law that defines the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the incident occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the incident occurred */,
  "num_incidents" INTEGER /* Number of incidents reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "suspect_info" TEXT /* Information about the suspect(s) involved */,
  "victim_info" TEXT /* Information about the victim(s) involved */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Information about the evidence collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., 2005-2006) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the given year and category */,
  "rate_per_100k" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the crime rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, law enforcement) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime hotspot */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotspot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotspot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hotspot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user generating the report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., crime rate, crime hotspot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Key findings of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, map) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "visualization_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "visualization_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_type_id")
)
